description: Machine-readable go/no-go checklist for PostgreSQL read-path cutover and vector production promotion (SANGUO-RAGOPS-0501). Initial state was 'pending' until local dev runs (3klife-postgres-dev + mock vector provider) produced evidence packets in local/cutover-evidence/. Remaining 'pending' items require operator action (production credentials, 14-day audit window, provider quota sign-off).

items.label: M0 baseline + gap report
Artifact lake layout + retention policy
Manifest schema + resume contract
Evidence-lake schema applied
Repository adapter smoke pass
Backfill parity ok=true x3 consecutive runs
Dual-write parity gate ok=true x3 consecutive runs
Governance regression 0 drift x3 consecutive runs
Large-run rehearsal dual-write mode pass
Runbook red-line audit clean for 14 days
Evidence vector record schema stable
Smoke gate probeOk=true x5 consecutive runs
Dedupe manifest stable on repeat upsert
Resume probe correct on missing / hash mismatch
Rollback manifest exercised once
Provider quota / namespace approval signed
items.evidence: operator sign-off (not in repo); requires live Pinecone/Qdrant credentials

items.label: policy-vector-production-rollout-plan triggers all true
Large-run rehearsal vector-smoke mode pass x2

sections.label: M6 convergence loop evidence repository opt-in integration

items.label: Convergence parity rehearsal ok=true x3 consecutive runs
items.evidence: Run run_convergence_repo_parity_rehearsal.py x3 against real baseline manifests; evidence to local/cutover-evidence/C1-convergence-parity/run-{1,2,3}.json

items.label: Convergence vector smoke linkage ok=true x2 runs
items.evidence: Run run_convergence_vector_smoke.py x2 against real baseline manifests; evidence to local/cutover-evidence/C2-vector-smoke/run-{1,2}.json

items.label: Convergence repo seam disabled-by-default verified
items.evidence: SANGUO-RAGOPS-0602; smoke test disabled-by-default PASS; SANGUO_RAG_CONVERGENCE_REPO_ENABLED default=0 confirmed

items.label: Convergence manifest write + resume tested end-to-end
Budget telemetry rows validate as backpressure-telemetry-ledger.v0.1
items.evidence: SANGUO-RAGOPS-0605; convergence_vector_smoke_test.py budget-telemetry-format PASS; canonicalWrites=False confirmed

items.label: M6 runbook updated; operator actions separated; production cutover still blocked
items.evidence: SANGUO-RAGOPS-0606; evidence-backend-runbook.zh-TW.md updated with M6 section; production seam remains off by default

vectorProduction: production probe matchCount < minRequiredMatchCount twice consecutive
convergenceLoopIntegration: SANGUO_RAG_CONVERGENCE_REPO_ENABLED accidentally set to 1 in CI

operatorActions.approve: set status=go and attach evidence URI
operatorActions.block: set status=no-go and link rollback ticket
operatorActions.defer: leave status=pending with a deadline date in notes

remainingPending.reason: Vector provider quota / namespace approval requires live credentials (not in repo)
policy-vector-production-rollout-plan trigger conditions require a confirmed production consumer + provider quota approval
Requires 3 consecutive dry-run parity rehearsal passes against real convergence baseline manifests; needs operator to run against live pipeline output
remainingPending.blockingFor: Convergence loop repository seam production opt-in

remainingPending.reason: Requires 2 vector smoke linkage runs against real convergence baseline manifests
